case_title: RHODORA HICKS VS. EUNICE NOBUKO KANEKO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF HICKS, RHODORA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2010 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HICKS, RHODORA AS TO DEFENDANT KANEKO, EUNICE NOBUKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF IS "GRANTED" AND TO BE HEARD WITH CASE #CSM-10-833934 - PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-30-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 - ** TO BE HEARD WITH CASE #CSM-10-833934 **
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUL-19-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KANEKO, EUNICE NOBUKO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HICKS, RHODORA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KANEKO, EUNICE NOBUKO $4,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $127.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,427.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KANEKO, EUNICE NOBUKO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
